AILY_CHAT.TITLE: Aily Chat
AILY_CHAT.DESCRIPTION: AI coding assistant for Aily Blockly
AILY_CHAT.SUBTITLE: Project copilot
AILY_CHAT.CONTEXT_CAPTION: Workspace context and tools are provided by the host
AILY_CHAT.WELCOME_BODY: Ask about the current project, request a change, or let Aily inspect the workspace.
AILY_CHAT.PLACEHOLDER: Ask Aily to inspect, explain, or change the project…
AILY_CHAT.FOOTNOTE: Aily can make mistakes. Review generated code and commands.
AILY_CHAT.DEMO_PROMPT: Analyze the current project and propose a clean React subapp boundary.
AILY_CHAT.DEMO_ANALYSIS_DETAIL: Separated rendering, host state, and tool execution.
AILY_CHAT.DEMO_ANSWER: The React child owns presentation and interaction state. Session lifecycle, model routing, project access, and tool execution remain in the Blockly host and are exposed through a versioned request/event protocol.
AILY_CHAT.DEMO_THINK: Mapped the request through the host protocol boundary.
AILY_CHAT.DEMO_REPLY: This standalone preview is using the local protocol simulator. Inside Aily Blockly, the same UI receives real session snapshots and streaming events from the host adapter.
